scenario.name: UAC INVITE with Unsupported Codec
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Test Call - Unsupported Codec Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=alice 123456 123456 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIPp Codec Mismatch Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 18 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
